name: Cyclic Adenosine Monophosphate
description: Cyclic adenosine monophosphate (cAMP, cyclic AMP or 3'-5'-cyclic adenosine monophosphate) is a molecule that is important in many biological processes; it is derived from adenosine triphosphate (ATP).

interactions.name: Teriflunomide
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cyclic Adenosine Monophosphate can be increased when it is combined with Teriflunomide.
